subject: Fix contrib-netbox-app deployment failing
commit_message:
Fix contrib-netbox-app deployment failing

imagePullSecrets was not present and thus preventing connecting to
registry where creds are mandatory.

Change-Id: I087fa77bd33341fa82527b3bc8ae04f323bd0f03
Issue-ID: OOM-1562
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/1421/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/1421

Patch Set 1:

see my comments for dmaap - could be same red-herring - it is just an image pull timing issue - see TSC-79

looks good - can't auth the gerrit review - I did start seeing this in casablanca recently  - but master is fine - are you sure the auth issue is secondary to the pull delay on the images
